category_sources: source_facts.description identifies falcoctl as a CLI for Falco and its ecosystem components.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.executables identify the official CLI name as falcoctl.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface available.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it works with Falco and ecosystem components; source_facts.homepage is under the official falcosecurity GitHub organization.
